item.title: An important message for men to hear...
item.description: "I'd rather me mate cry on me shoulder than go to his funeral next week." - Paddy Pimblett SMS 988 in the USA for Text Suicide Prevention Support
item.dc:creator: IamJACKSventedSPLEEN

item.title: It be hot as hec
item.description:
I wasn't made for this past weeks highest of 40 degrees Celsius, it's 30 today and I think I'm melting into a puddle :'D My favourite boots are in storage until autumn, so let me introduce you to my summer footwear; peach chunky sneakers!
Cats tax: Mr. Chonk and the Bean! Despite wearing fur coats they don't seem even the slightest bit bothered by the heat! If you would like to see more of my illustrations you can find them on my Instagram (I don't post them here as much as I do there): https://www.instagram.com/revives_illustrations
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: My favorite comedian working today: Kyle Kinane
item.description: Cat tax These are from his new album 'Trampoline in a Ditch' - an absolute masterpiece, and the video for it was recently released. See the full special here: https://youtu.be/OIBg8L2yxJA And here's a funny clip of him talking about gun control: https://youtu.be/Bbe7o-Cu4Y8

item.title: Exposing Republican Lies (Best of July 2022)
item.description: All content from this post belongs to @BootsDusty. Article I: https://www.lgbtqnation.com/2022/07/bisexual-daughter-cuts-ties-dad-hes-gop-state-senator-taking-rights-away/ Article II: https://www.lgbtqnation.com/2022/07/far-right-falsely-says-highland-park-shooter-transgender-stop-gun-control-push/ Article III: https://www.lgbtqnation.com/2022/06/democrats-introduce-transgender-bill-rights-fight-republican-anti-lgbtq-attacks/

item.title: Borrowed Memes
item.dc:creator: brojoe4

item.title: The Leopards Ate My Face Party
item.description:
Trump man is shocked when wife is deported.
Trump woman shocked when her husband is deported. These are the "very good people" who make up the Trump party. They're the sort to vote against their loved ones. We have no hope of swaying most of them, but you can vote. You can vote in favor of your mom, your wife, your, sister, your daughter. In favor of your lgbtq+ family and friends. To vote in favor of compassion and humanity.
item.dc:creator: TheRealSleepIsForChumps

item.title: Harvest of stolen memes throughout the ages - the first.
item.description:
#gnuterrypratchett
I have ducks, trying to get my phone to type the other word is hard. It likes duck too much
Because cheese is life
1000% will
The meme I came here to post. Positive thoughts are a gift you can give yourself.
Dog tax, dis Jerry at 4 mos, he’s 8 now and still a knobhead but we love him. #blacklab #dogtax. EDIT: most viral, thanks guys I hope at least one of these helps your self-care Sunday
item.dc:creator: CheesePleaseTraceyJohnson

item.title: Goblin Girl Gives a Godly Bath
item.description: [edit] Illustrated by Brian Campise. Mini-comics featuring characters from our webcomic Arru and the Magical Mask. We post the comic on Webtoon on a weekly basis: https://www.webtoons.com/en/challenge/arru-and-the-magical-mask/list?title_no=632264&page=1 If you'd like to support us, we also have a Patreon here: https://www.patreon.com/campside
item.dc:creator: MarcusSimius

item.title: I would also like to boop all the murder floofs
item.description: Okay, I found this cute and shared. But as posted by few people below, there's a high probability of exploitation of these animals. link of a source : https://www.reddit.com/r/forbiddenboops/comments/taanh0/seen_way_too_many_of_safarisammies_videos I am not deleting this post but removing link to their channel and adding this description to let people know.
item.dc:creator: IndianCowboy

item.title: Priorities.
item.description: These good doggos were working in 2019 at the San Diego Comic-Con but I asked their Moms if I could give them a pat and received an enthusiastic go ahead. This cutie nuzzled right in. EDIT - Thank you for the Most Viral my Dudes! May the Furs Be With You!

item.title: If this makes it out of usersub I'll go down...
item.description:
I'm cleaning a vacant, very old shop.. Update for you heathens.. I need a coffee https://imgur.com/gallery/I2aGnc0
It's so freakin dark I can't see the end of the stairs. And the bloody light doesn't work. **My first time on the front page! Send something to cure the spook please**
item.dc:creator: CharacterNotUnlocked
